ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Quote_Number__r.ApprovalStatus__c , 'Pending'), OR( ISCHANGED(CONTAINER_Quote_Number__c ) , ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Qty__c ) ,ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_WeekOf__c ) ,ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Destination__c ) ,ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Account__c ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You need to recall approval to make changes.
